creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Freitag, 22. Dezember 2006 08:50 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/p5-Nagios-Plugin,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107076 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107076

This update is already done:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106941

So long...

Gerrit
